root_text.sn22.134:2.1: “Idhāvuso, assutavā puthujjano rūpassa samudayañca atthaṅgamañca assādañca ādīnavañca nissaraṇañca yathābhūtaṁ nappajānāti.
root_text.sn22.134:2.5: viññāṇassa samudayañca atthaṅgamañca assādañca ādīnavañca nissaraṇañca yathābhūtaṁ nappajānāti.
root_text.sn22.134:3.1: Evaṁ vutte, āyasmā sāriputto āyasmantaṁ mahākoṭṭhikaṁ etadavoca:
root_text.sn22.134:4.1: “Idhāvuso, sutavā ariyasāvako rūpassa samudayañca atthaṅgamañca assādañca ādīnavañca nissaraṇañca yathābhūtaṁ pajānāti.
root_text.sn22.134:4.5: viññāṇassa samudayañca atthaṅgamañca assādañca ādīnavañca nissaraṇañca yathābhūtaṁ pajānāti.

translation_text.sn22.134:1.2: “Reverend Koṭṭhita, they speak of this thing called ‘ignorance’.
translation_text.sn22.134:1.4: And how is an ignorant person defined?”
translation_text.sn22.134:2.1: “Reverend, an unlearned ordinary person doesn’t truly understand the origin, the disappearance, the gratification, the drawback, and the escape when it comes to form,
translation_text.sn22.134:2.7: And this is how an ignorant person is defined.”
translation_text.sn22.134:3.1: When he said this, Venerable Sāriputta said to him:
translation_text.sn22.134:3.2: “Reverend Koṭṭhita, they speak of this thing called ‘knowledge’.
translation_text.sn22.134:3.4: And how is a knowledgeable person defined?”
translation_text.sn22.134:4.1: “Reverend, a learned noble disciple truly understands the origin, the disappearance, the gratification, the drawback, and the escape when it comes to form,
translation_text.sn22.134:4.7: And this is how a knowledgeable person is defined.”
